document_id: DAAS_AS_03_2023- The Division of Aging & Adult Services (DAAS)- Special Assistance- In Home (SAIH) Interagency Referral Form- DRAFT.pdf

findings.description: Loss of horizontal alignment and column structure for form fields.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, fields like 'Case Name:' and 'Client Phone #' are horizontally separated on the left and right sides of the page. In the HTML, they are collapsed together onto a single line ('Case Name: Client Phone #'). This occurs throughout the document, including the 'Client Address' line and within the Application/Recertification sections.

findings.description: Fillable blank lines (underlines) are partially missing.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the text reads 'SAIH Certification Period: ______ to ______'. In the HTML, it renders as 'SAIH Certification Period: to Enhanced rate?'.
